headline: LendingClub CEO expects ‘skinned knees’ amid fintech charter rush
summary: Fintechs that want to become banks should brace for “a learning curve” as they ramp up governance, risk and compliance infrastructure, said LendingClub CEO Scott Sanborn.

headline: Tencent links PayPal to WeChat Pay network, enabling US users to spend across China
summary: U.S. PayPal users can now make purchases across ‌China using WeChat Pay's QR-code ‌merchant network, Tencent Financial Technology said on Wednesday, ​adding the service will be rolled out to PayPal users in other markets in phases. Tencent's cross-border payment platform ‌TenPay Global ⁠is now connected to PayPal World, Tencent Financial Technology vice ⁠president Daniel Hong said, according to a company social media post. The company ​is offering ​incentives to ​encourage the use ‌of foreign bank cards linked to WeChat Pay, including temporary fee waivers through 2026.

The company ​is offering ​incentives to ​encourage the use ‌of foreign bank cards linked to WeChat Pay, including temporary fee waivers through 2026.

headline: Tencent Announces Three Initiatives to Make Inbound Payments for International Visitors Easier Than Ever During APEC 2026
summary: Tencent today launched the "2026 Inbound Payment Service Upgrade Initiative" at the opening forum of the 20th Shenzhen International Financial Expo, alongside the Shenzhen Municipal Financial Regulatory Bureau, the People's Bank of China Shenzhen Branch, and PayPal World.
